All Practices, Qualifiers and Races are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary.
The 2026 season will consist of 6 Sprint Races within the 24 weekends.
For the first time 11 Teams and 22 Drivers will compete to win the World Formula 1 Championships for Drivers and Teams.

beIN 4K.title_en: Newcastle United vs. Manchester United - English Premier League 2026/2027
beIN 4K.title_fr: Newcastle United contre Manchester United - Premier League anglaise 2026/2027
beIN 4K.desc_ar: Newcastle United have won their last three home Premier League matches against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 combined. The Magpies last had a longer home league winning run against the Red Devils between 1915 and 1931. Man Utd are looking to record a Premier League double over Newcastle for the first time since the 2020-21 campaign; they won 1-0 on Boxing Day thanks to a goal from Patrick Dorgu.
